name: Aquanaut
author: Poki
description:
Aquanaut is a fun submarine 2D exploration game where you play as a submarine swimming through the sea. Beware of strong currents pushing you and beware of enemies ! Let nothing stop you in your quest of gathering gems ! Aquanaut is developed by Nitrome. Every level has different challenges. The game has remained to be popular to this day! Enjoy your marine adventures here on Poki! {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[ {"@type":"Question","name":"How to play Aquanaut?", "acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Collect all the gems on your way and reach the treasure chest at the end of the level.
